◎简　　介  

　　Onassis Hernandez was once the proud owner of Singapore’s most popular Filipino diner. But a food-poisoning scandal triggered by a disgruntled cook has left him on the brink of bankruptcy. When he is further outdone by a financial scam, Onassis takes a group of people hostage in a millionaire’s bungalow. The crisis is captured on video and sparks an international outcry. Will O...
